name: Together AI API
what_it_does: Together AI provides serverless and dedicated inference for 100+ open-source models including Llama 3, Mistral, FLUX, and Stable Diffusion via an OpenAI-compatible API, plus managed fine-tuning and embeddings.
use_cases: Run inference on a broad catalog of open-source models (Llama 3.1, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek) with a single OpenAI-compatible API client
Generate embeddings for RAG pipelines using models like BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 or Mistral-7B-based embedding endpoints
Fine-tune Llama or Mistral models on custom datasets using Together's managed fine-tuning API and then deploy them to the same endpoint
Generate images with FLUX.1 or Stable Diffusion models through the same API client used for text completions
Benchmark multiple open-source models on the same task by switching model IDs within the same API call structure to compare quality and cost
not_for: Applications requiring proprietary frontier models (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini) not available in open-weight form
Production workloads requiring guaranteed SLA-backed uptime beyond what serverless inference provides
Teams needing integrated agent orchestration, memory, or built-in RAG pipeline management
best_when: You want a large catalog of open-source models with a unified OpenAI-compatible interface, including text, embeddings, and image generation in one platform.
avoid_when: You need the absolute lowest latency (Groq is faster) or require proprietary model access unavailable in open-weight form.

auth.notes: API key passed as Bearer token in Authorization header. Fully OpenAI SDK compatible — set base_url to api.together.xyz/v1 and use existing OpenAI client.

pricing.paid_tiers: Serverless inference per token: Llama 3.1 8B ~$0.18/M tokens, Llama 3.1 70B ~$0.88/M tokens, Llama 3.1 405B ~$3.50/M tokens, Mixtral 8x7B ~$0.60/M tokens, Mistral 7B ~$0.20/M tokens. FLUX.1 image generation ~$0.01-0.05 per image. Dedicated endpoints from ~$0.80/hr.
pricing.notes: Most models bill input and output tokens at the same rate. Free models available (older/smaller models). Fine-tuning costs additional per-token for training plus storage.

performance.rate_limits: Free tier: 1 req/sec, 60 req/min. Paid: 10 req/sec per model, configurable higher. Rate limits are per model, not global.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OpenAI-compatible error format (error.type, error.message, error.code). 429 rate limit errors include Retry-After header. Credit exhaustion returns clear 402 with message.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: LLM inference is inherently non-idempotent (temperature > 0 produces different outputs). No request idempotency keys. Use seed parameter for reproducible outputs.
known_agent_gotchas: Model availability varies — models can be added or removed; always check /models endpoint before hardcoding model IDs
Context window sizes differ significantly between models; don't assume GPT-4 context limits apply
Streaming responses require server-sent events handling; some proxy setups break SSE
Fine-tuned model IDs use a different naming convention (username/model-name) which can confuse routing logic
JSON mode ('response_format': {'type': 'json_object'}) not supported by all models

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Single API key with no scope restrictions. SOC 2 Type II compliant. Privacy policy states customer prompts are not used for training. US-only data processing.
